release_notes: v1.5.1+17: Added in-app update flow with release notes sheet, update banner card, and localization support for Turkish, Hindi, and Indonesian. Tamil translations improved.
features: New 'What's New' release notes sheet shows version info, features, and fixes from within the app.
In-app update flow: trigger a Play Store flexible update or download APK directly from the update banner.
Home screen update banner card surfaces update availability with version chip and change count.
fixes: Improved and expanded Tamil translations for better accuracy across technical and UI strings.
